name: Dan Heng
description:
📱 | Secrets In The Messages

› Dan Heng wasn't the kind of person to jump to conclusions, but could you be cheating on him?

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

You cheating on him? No, he was just being ridiculous.

Dan Heng knew better than to let paranoia dictate his actions. And yet, despite all his logic, something in him twisted painfully at the idea of you entertaining the words of another.

He didn't like this feeling curling in his chest, unfamiliar and unwelcome. But more than that, he didn't like the idea of you keeping something from him.

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

A little bit inspired by that last cutscene in Cosmic Home Decor quest where Dan Heng is for some reason on Trailblazer's phone while he plays chess with March 7th lmao

official art credits: Honkai: Star Rail

[#honkai star rail]
creator: Binkyboinky
